artisans.title: The Hands Behind The Magic
artisans.description: Passionate Oromo artisans preserving culture, identity, and heritage through handcrafted traditional clothing.
artisans.founderDesc: Leading Biftu Oromo Cultural Cloth with passion, preserving Oromo weaving traditions for future generations.
artisans.creativeDesc: Designing modern Oromo cultural fashion while honoring authentic traditional craftsmanship.
artisans.masterDesc: Specialist in handmade Oromo embroidery and traditional cultural weaving techniques.
